visual_description: A man in dark clothing stands outdoors at night gesturing with his hand, and a bright flash illuminates silhouettes of two men in suits. A man in a light suit talks on a phone with a serious expression, a close-up shows a man behind metal bars looking worried, a suited man with an earpiece holds a walkie-talkie, and another man looks upward with his mouth open.
audio_description: The audio features a man speaking on a phone, a radio transmission, and a brief shout amid ambient background noise.
